description: Legal document in the hand of Hillel b. Eli. Dating: 3 Nissan 1388 Seleucid (March 30, 1077 CE). Declaration by ʿAllūn b. Yaʿīsh the Parnas, acting as attorney for the heirs of Avraham Ibn al-ʿĀbid, who had operated a grainstore (fāmī) in partnership with [not preserved] and who had obviously suddenly died, since there is a reference to his illness and to the fact that six dinars were found in his mandīl. Information from Goitein's index card.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בכתב יד הלל בן עלי; 3 לניסן 1388 שטרות = 30 במרץ 1077 לספירה; עלון בן יאעיש הפרנס כסוכן ליורשי אברהם בן אל-עאבד, שהיה בעל מחסן דגן
